name: sessiondiff
description: Local-first CLI for comparing coding-agent session logs.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/cli.js compare tests/fixtures/before.log tests/fixtures/after.jsonl --format json >/tmp/sessiondiff-smoke.json && node dist/cli.js summarize tests/fixtures/tool-blocks.log --format markdown >/tmp/sessiondiff-smoke.md
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
